type.description:
Type of the operation, `double_baking` - is used by bakers to provide evidence of double baking
(baking two different blocks at the same height) by a baker

id.description: Unique ID of the operation, stored in the TzKT indexer database

level.description: Height of the block from the genesis block, in which the operation was included

timestamp.description: Datetime of the block, in which the operation was included (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)

block.description: Hash of the block, in which the operation was included

accusedLevel.description: Height of the block from the genesis, which was double baked

slashedLevel.description: Height of the block from the genesis, at which the offender was slashed

accuser.description: Information about the baker, produced the block, in which the accusation was included

reward.description: Reward of the baker, produced the block, in which the accusation was included

offender.description: Information about the baker, accused for producing two different blocks at the same level

lostStaked.description: Amount slashed from baker's own staked balance

lostUnstaked.description: Amount slashed from baker's own unstaked balance

lostExternalStaked.description: Amount slashed from baker's external staked balance

lostExternalUnstaked.description: Amount slashed from baker's external unstaked balance

stakingUpdatesCount.description: Number of staking updates happened internally

quote.description: Injected historical quote at the time of operation
